name: finca-tigrillo-ios-shell
description: Capacitor native iOS shell that wraps the deployed Finca Tigrillo PWA. Delivered unsigned to ULEAM IT Matrix Team for institutional signing and distribution.

scripts.build:debug: xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
